name: ProgressBar
description: Linear progress indicator used inside Card and RouterMarqueeItem to show timer or loading progress.

props.name: tone
props.description: knockout = white track+fill (on dark surfaces), default = standard

notes: The root element should carry role='progressbar' aria-valuenow={progress} aria-valuemin='0' aria-valuemax='100'.
Provide an aria-label describing what is progressing (e.g. 'Auto-advance timer').
